column1: In March 2022, the International Sustainability Standards Board (ISSB) published Exposure Draft IFRS S2
Climate-related Disclosures, integrating and building on the recommendations of the Task Force on Climate-
related Financial Disclosures (TCFD) and incorporating industry-based disclosure requirements derived from
SASB Standards. The ISSB redeliberated the proposals after considering the feedback on the Exposure Draft.
In June 2023, the ISSB issued IFRS S2 Climate-related Disclosures.
